message:
fix(tui): widen board footer test to 240 cols to prevent link hint truncation

The board footer string exceeds 200 characters when link hints are
appended. At 120 columns, the terminal truncates before "o open link"
and "y copy link" are visible. Widening the test terminal to 240
columns ensures the assertions can find the hints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
